---
title: "verband_tussen_2_resultaten"
author: "Vani Rembet, Jesse Postma, AI-chat"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)

library(ggplot2)
library(tidyr)
library(mirt)
library(dplyr)
```

## Methode 1: Logistic Regression (Vani)

```{r inlezen}
german_form <- read.table("Duitse taalvaardigheid onderzoek(1-154).csv", header = T, sep = ';', fileEncoding = 'latin1')
colnames(german_form) <- paste0("V", 1:ncol(german_form))
```

#### Dont forget: V16 is scale 1-5 dus geen vraag

```{r logistic_regression}
# Data uithalen
german_long <- pivot_longer(
  german_form,
  cols = 17:66,
  names_to = "question",
  values_to = "answer"
)

# Data opschonen
german_long$answer <- as.numeric(as.character(german_long$answer))
german_long <- subset(german_long, answer %in% c(0,1))

# Vraagnummers
german_long$question_num <- as.numeric(gsub("V", "", german_long$question)) - min(as.numeric(gsub("V", "", german_long$question))) + 1

# Logistic regression
model <- glm(answer ~ question_num, data = german_long, family = binomial)

a_0 <- coef(model)[1]
a_1 <- coef(model)[2]
x_50 <- -a_0 / a_1

# Voorspelling
pred_data <- data.frame(
  question_num = seq(min(german_long$question_num), max(german_long$question_num))
)
pred_data$prob <- predict(model, newdata = pred_data, type = "response")

# Grafiek maken
ggplot(german_long, aes(x = question_num, y = answer)) +
  geom_jitter(alpha = 0.1, height = 0.05) +
  geom_line(data = pred_data, aes(y = prob), color = "darkred") +
  geom_point(data = pred_data, aes(y = prob), color = "darkred") +
  labs(
    x = "Vraagnummer",
    y = "Slagingskans",
    title = "Gemiddelde behaalde niveau van alle deelnemers"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```

```{r drempel_methode}
# Niveaus
german_long$gedeelte <- ceiling(german_long$question_num / 10) * 10

# Aantal goed per persoon per niveau
scores_gedeelte <- aggregate(answer ~ V1 + gedeelte, data = german_long, FUN = sum)

# Scores per persoon
scores_per_persoon <- aggregate(answer ~ V1, data = german_long, FUN = mean)
colnames(scores_per_persoon) <- c("persoon", "score")

# Kies een persoon
persoon_id <- scores_per_persoon$persoon[67]
persoon_data <- subset(german_long, V1 == persoon_id)

# Drempel
drempel <- 6

persoon_scores <- subset(scores_gedeelte, V1 == persoon_id)
persoon_scores <- persoon_scores[order(persoon_scores$gedeelte), ]
behaald <- persoon_scores$gedeelte[cumprod(persoon_scores$answer >= drempel) == 1]
hoogste_niveau <- ifelse(length(behaald) > 0, max(behaald), 0)

# Plotten
ggplot(persoon_data, aes(x = factor(gedeelte), y = answer)) +
  geom_jitter(alpha = 0.1, height = 0.05) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  labs(
    x = "Vraagnummer",
    y = "Slagingskans",
    title = paste("Niveau persoon", persoon_id, "->", hoogste_niveau)
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```

## Methode 2: IRT Rasch Model (Jesse)

```{r irt_model}
german_res <- read.table("Duitse taalvaardigheid onderzoek(1-154).csv", sep = ';', fileEncoding = 'latin1', skip = 1)

questions <- german_res %>% select(V17:V66)

irt_model <- mirt(data = questions, model = 1, itemtype = "Rasch")

individual_scores <- fscores(irt_model)
item_params <- coef(irt_model, IRTpars = TRUE, simplify = TRUE)$item
head(item_params)
```

```{r irt_drempel}
prob_target <- 0.60
logit_add <- log(prob_target / (1 - prob_target))

diff_A1 <- mean(item_params[paste0("V", 17:26), "b"])
diff_A2 <- mean(item_params[paste0("V", 27:36), "b"])
diff_B1 <- mean(item_params[paste0("V", 37:46), "b"])
diff_B2 <- mean(item_params[paste0("V", 47:56), "b"])
diff_C1C2 <- mean(item_params[paste0("V", 57:66), "b"])

threshold_A2 <- diff_A2 + logit_add
threshold_B1 <- diff_B1 + logit_add
threshold_B2 <- diff_B2 + logit_add
threshold_C1C2 <- diff_C1C2 + logit_add

cat("Threshold for A2:", threshold_A2, "\n")
cat("Threshold for B1:", threshold_B1, "\n")
cat("Threshold for B2:", threshold_B2, "\n")
cat("Threshold for C1/2:", threshold_C1C2, "\n")
```

```{r irt_niveaus}
cleaned_data <- german_res %>%
    mutate(
        score = as.numeric(individual_scores),
        CEFR = case_when(
            score < threshold_A2 ~ "A1",
            score >= threshold_A2 & score < threshold_B1 ~ "A2",
            score >= threshold_B1 & score < threshold_B2 ~ "B1",
            score >= threshold_B2 & score < threshold_C1C2 ~ "B2",
            score >= threshold_C1C2 ~ "C1/C2",
            TRUE ~ "Unknown"
        )
    ) %>%
    select(-(V17:V66))
```

## Vergelijking tussen de twee methoden

```{r bullet_chart}
# Methode 1 (Vani): bereken niveau voor alle personen
niveau_labels <- c("0" = "< A1", "10" = "A1", "20" = "A2", "30" = "B1", "40" = "B2", "50" = "C1")
alle_niveaus_vani <- data.frame(persoon = integer(), niveau_vani = character())
for (pid in unique(scores_gedeelte$V1)) {
  ps <- subset(scores_gedeelte, V1 == pid)
  ps <- ps[order(ps$gedeelte), ]
  behaald <- ps$gedeelte[cumprod(ps$answer >= drempel) == 1]
  hn <- ifelse(length(behaald) > 0, max(behaald), 0)
  alle_niveaus_vani <- rbind(alle_niveaus_vani,
                              data.frame(persoon = pid, niveau_vani = niveau_labels[as.character(hn)]))
}

# Methode 2 (Jesse): CEFR uit cleaned_data
alle_niveaus_jesse <- data.frame(persoon = cleaned_data$V1, niveau_jesse = cleaned_data$CEFR)

# Samenvoegen
vergelijking <- merge(alle_niveaus_vani, alle_niveaus_jesse, by = "persoon")

# Niveaus naar numeriek
niveau_naar_num <- c("< A1" = 0, "A1" = 1, "A2" = 2, "B1" = 3, "B2" = 4, "C1" = 5, "C1/C2" = 5)
vergelijking$score_vani <- niveau_naar_num[as.character(vergelijking$niveau_vani)]
vergelijking$score_jesse <- niveau_naar_num[as.character(vergelijking$niveau_jesse)]

vergelijking$score_vani[vergelijking$score_vani == 0] <- 1
vergelijking$score_jesse[vergelijking$score_jesse == 0] <- 1

# Scatterplot
vergelijking <- subset(vergelijking, score_vani > 0 & score_jesse > 0)

ggplot(vergelijking, aes(x = score_jesse, y = score_vani)) +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.2, height = 0.2, alpha = 0.5) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = 1:5, labels = c("A1", "A2", "B1", "B2", "C1")) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = 1:5, labels = c("A1", "A2", "B1", "B2", "C1")) +
  geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "darkred") +
  labs(
    x = "IRT-methode (Jesse)",
    y = "Drempelmethode (Vani)",
    title = "Vergelijking CEFR-niveaus"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```
```{r}
# Maak een frequentietabel
tabel_df <- as.data.frame(table(vergelijking$score_vani, vergelijking$score_jesse))
colnames(tabel_df) <- c("Drempelmethode", "IRT_methode", "Aantal")

# Heatmap
ggplot(tabel_df, aes(x = IRT_methode, y = Drempelmethode, fill = Aantal)) +
  geom_tile() +
  geom_text(aes(label = Aantal), size = 5) +
  scale_fill_gradient(low = "white", high = "darkred") +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = c("1" = "A1", "2" = "A2", "3" = "B1", "4" = "B2", "5" = "C1")) +
  scale_y_discrete(labels = c("1" = "A1", "2" = "A2", "3" = "B1", "4" = "B2", "5" = "C1")) +
  labs(
    x = "IRT-methode (Jesse)",
    y = "Drempelmethode (Vani)",
    title = "Vergelijking CEFR-niveaus"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```
